_trn_login.sign_in_with_microsoft_text: Sign in with your Microsoft Account. You need to own Minecraft to be able to log-in.
_trn_login.enter_code_in_browser: Enter the specified code on the browser page to complete the authorization
_trn_login.waiting_for_browser_auth: Waiting for you to sign in...
_trn_login.polling_microsoft_auth: Waiting for authorization from Microsoft servers...
_trn_login.link_not_working_help: If the open browser button is not working, you can open the link directly in your browser:
_trn_login.read_and_accept: By proceeding I confirm that I have read, understood and accepted the <0>Terms of Service</0> and <1>Privacy Statement</1>
_trn_login.enable_hashed_email: Enable the use of <0>hashed email</0> for advertising personalization. This does not affect whether or not you ads are show, but you will see ads more relevant to you.
_trn_login.we_value_privacy_text_renew: In order to be compliant with GDPR, CCPA and other data privacy laws, we are required to ask for the renewal of your confirmation, either periodically or whenever they are updated.
_trn_login.we_value_privacy_text1: Nokiatis Launcher supports the display of in-app ads. This allows support for us, the developers of Nokiatis Launcher, and all mods and modpacks developers from the CurseForge platform.
_trn_login.we_value_privacy_text2: In order to deliver ads that are relevant for you, trusted <0>ad vendors</0> store and/or access information on your computer, and process personal data such as IP address and cookies.
_trn_login.we_value_privacy_text3: Click "Manage CMP" to control your consents, or to object to the processing of your data when done on the basis of legitimate interest.
_trn_login.we_value_privacy_text4: You can change your preferences at any time via the settings screen.
_trn_login.we_value_privacy_text5: Purposes we use: Store and/or access information on a device, personalized ads and content, ad and content measurement, audience insights and product development.
_trn_login.recovery_email_description: This email should be different from your Microsoft account, to ensure you are able to recover your data in case you lose access to it.
_trn_login.nickname_description: This nickname will be displayed in the game and on the launcher. Other people might see it as your username.
_trn_login.check_your_email_for_a_verifi: Check your Email for a Verification Link
_trn_login.an_email_has_been_sent_to_you: An email has been sent to your email address. Make sure to check your spam folder.
_trn_login.email_request_wait: You need to wait {{time}} to request a new verification link.
_trn_login.new_email_request_wait: You need to wait {{time}} before requesting a new email change again.
_trn_login.login_retry_message: If you logged-in but this page doesn't update, please try again. Sometimes microsoft servers don't respond as expected.
_trn_login.gdlauncher_account_descriptio: You can now use your Nokiatis Launcher account to log in to the launcher and access your saved instances, settings and more.
_trn_login.what_is_a_gdlauncher_account: What is a Nokiatis Launcher account?
_trn_login.what_is_a_gdlauncher_account_: A Nokiatis Launcher account is a way to save your settings, preferences, instance backups and more across all your devices.
_trn_login.how_does_it_work_text: A Nokiatis Launcher account is just an entry in our database that is linked to your Microsoft account ID <0>( {{account_id}} )</0>. We use your token to authenticate you, your password is NEVER stored.
_trn_login.what_if_i_lose_access_to_my_m: What if I lose access to my Microsoft account?
Since we don't store any info about you, the only way to recover your data in case you lose access to your Microsoft account is to use a different recovery email (in the next step).
_trn_login.what_happens_if_i_skip_the_ac: What happens if I skip the account creation?
The Nokiatis account creation is completely optional. If you do decide to not create one, some features of the launcher might be unavailable.
_trn_login.sync_existing_account_descrip: Sync your existing Nokiatis account to access:
_trn_login.found_existing_account_descri: Welcome back, {{name}}! Sync your existing Nokiatis Launcher account to restore your instances, settings and playtime across all your devices.
_trn_login.setup_later_in_settings: You can set this up later in Settings
_trn_login.unlock_features_description: Share instances with friends, track playtime and sync your settings across all your devices.
_trn_login.quick_setup_time: Takes just 2 minutes to set up
_trn_login.welcome_returning_tagline: Let's get you signed in to continue
_trn_login.terms_subtitle: Please review our terms and privacy information
_trn_login.updated_terms_subtitle: We've updated our Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy. Please review and accept them to continue.
_trn_login.cmp_notice_paragraph1: Nokiatis Launcher may display in-app ads to help provide you with a free high-quality app. In order to deliver ads that are relevant for you, Nokiatis Launcher and trusted ad vendors store and/or access information on your computer, and process personal data such as IP address and cookies.
_trn_login.cmp_instructions: Click on the "Manage CMP" button to control your consents, or to object to the processing of your data when done on the basis of legitimate interest. You can change your preferences at any time via the settings screen.
_trn_login.terms_checkbox_label: By continuing I agree and accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
_trn_login.device_code_explanation: Device code lets you sign in on a different device or browser. You'll receive a code to enter at microsoft.com/devicelogin
_trn_login.session_expired_message: The authentication session has expired. Please try again.
_trn_login.complete_signin_browser: Complete the sign-in process in your browser.
_trn_login.create_account_description: Create a Nokiatis Launcher account to access advanced features
_trn_login.benefit_share_instances_frien: Share instances and modpacks with friends
_trn_login.benefit_track_metrics_playtim: Track metrics and playtime across devices
_trn_login.account_security_notice: Your Nokiatis Launcher account is linked to your Microsoft account. All data is encrypted and private.
_trn_login.enter_recovery_email_nickname: Enter your recovery email and choose a nickname for your Nokiatis Launcher account.
_trn_login.check_email_verification: Check your email for a verification link.
_trn_profile_creation.title: Create Your Minecraft Username
_trn_profile_creation.description: Choose a unique username for your Minecraft profile. This will be your identity in-game.
_trn_profile_creation.invalid_format: Username must be 3-16 characters and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores
_trn_profile_creation.not_allowed: Username not allowed (contains profanity or violates rules)
_trn_profile_creation.created_but_failed: Profile created but failed to continue. Please try signing in again.
_trn_profile_creation.create_failed: Failed to create profile. Please try again.
_trn_loading.taking_longer: This is taking longer than expected. Please be patient...
_trn_auth.loading.taking_longer: This is taking longer than expected. Please be patient...
_trn_login.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
_trn_login.nickname_too_short: Nickname must be at least 3 characters
_trn_login.verification_sent_to: We've sent a verification email to {{email}}. Check your inbox and spam folder.
_trn_login.check_spam_folder: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder.
_trn_login.verification_email_notice: We'll send you a verification email to confirm your account.
_trn_login.failed_to_check_account_descr: We couldn't verify your Nokiatis Launcher account status. This may be due to a network issue. Please try again.
